titles.text: 神秘の世界エルハザード

descriptions.text: The Game Boy Advance port of "Shinpi no Sekai El-Hazard" is a Adventure video game published by AIC Spirits & Pioneer LDC, Rob Jinnai released on May 1, 2003.
The story go by Makoto and his companion got trap into another unknown world and Makoto have been chosen as savior by pray of the princess.
